title: Viners Tabac 18/0 Stainless Steel desert Knife Dessert Knife (Pack of 5)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

CLASSIC CUTLERY | The Viners Tabac Dessert Knife is the perfect addition to any table setting. This unique cutlery design follows the classic teardrop shape. The dessert knife is excellently balanced with contemporary handles that are slender and smooth.
DURABILITY | Made from fine quality 18/0 steel, our cutlery is polished to a mirror finish. The long-lasting dessert knife is rust-resistant and can be used in the dishwasher.
PLEASE NOTE | This item is sold as a single dessert knife.

TABAC | The Viners Tabac cutlery brings a classic and fine-dining touch to the dinner table. Utilising a stylish design that gently flows to form the classic teardrop cutlery shape, the Tabac cutlery range is perfect for everyday use and special occasions. The Tabac range is complete with a 25-year guarantee

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust cookware and cutlery
